name: lumen-seed
description: Lumen stage-0 host shims: the CLI, daemon, and MCP server over the native compiler + in-process interpreter. WebAssembly retired in R5 - see native/lumenc.bootstrap.c and native/ir_interpreter.mjs.

scripts.test: node basics.mjs && node test.mjs && node safety.mjs && node loop_test.mjs && node cache_test.mjs && node profile_report_test.mjs && node effects_test.mjs && node ir_render_test.mjs && node selfhost_diff.mjs && node selfhost_float_fuzz.mjs && node ../tools/purity_gate.mjs
